Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and higher retesting cycles driving QA actual spend to ₹3,25,000 against a budget of ₹3,00,000, there is a risk that quality assurance costs will continue to escalate, which could lead to budget exhaustion, delayed delivery timelines, and reduced project profitability.
